speaker: PANDER
text: Well, I had rather than twice the worth of her

speaker: PANDER
text: she had ne’er come here.

speaker: BAWD
text: Fie, fie upon her! She’s able to freeze the god

speaker: BAWD
text: Priapus and undo a whole generation. We must

speaker: BAWD
text: either get her ravished or be rid of her. When she

speaker: BAWD
text: should do for clients her fitment and do me the

speaker: BAWD
text: kindness of our profession, she has me her quirks,

speaker: BAWD
text: her reasons, her master reasons, her prayers, her

speaker: BAWD
text: knees, that she would make a puritan of the devil if

speaker: BAWD
text: he should cheapen a kiss of her.

speaker: BOLT
text: Faith, I must ravish her, or she’ll disfurnish us of

speaker: BOLT
text: all our cavalleria, and make our swearers priests.

speaker: PANDER
text: Now the pox upon her greensickness for me!

speaker: BAWD
text: Faith, there’s no way to be rid on ’t but by the

speaker: BAWD
text: way to the pox.

speaker: BAWD
text: Here comes the Lord Lysimachus disguised.

speaker: BOLT
text: We should have both lord and lown, if the peevish

speaker: BOLT
text: baggage would but give way to customers.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: How now! How a

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: dozen of virginities?

speaker: BAWD
text: Now the gods to-bless your Honor!

speaker: BOLT
text: I am glad to see your Honor in good health.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: You may so. ’Tis the better for you that

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: your resorters stand upon sound legs. How now?

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Wholesome iniquity have you that a man may deal

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: withal and defy the surgeon?

speaker: BAWD
text: We have here one, sir, if she would—but there

speaker: BAWD
text: never came her like in Mytilene.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: If she’d do the deeds of darkness, thou

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: wouldst say?

speaker: BAWD
text: Your Honor knows what ’tis to say, well enough.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Well, call forth, call forth.

speaker: BOLT
text: For flesh and blood, sir, white and red, you shall

speaker: BOLT
text: see a rose; and she were a rose indeed, if she had

speaker: BOLT
text: but—

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: What, prithee?

speaker: BOLT
text: O, sir, I can be modest.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: That dignifies the renown of a bawd no

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: less than it gives a good report to a number to be

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: chaste.

speaker: BAWD
text: Here comes that which grows to the stalk, never

speaker: BAWD
text: plucked yet, I can assure you. Is she not a fair

speaker: BAWD
text: creature?

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Faith, she would serve after a long voyage

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: at sea. Well, there’s for you.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Leave us.

speaker: BAWD
text: I beseech your Honor, give me leave a word, and

speaker: BAWD
text: I’ll have done presently.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: I beseech you, do.

speaker: BAWD
text: First, I would have you note this is

speaker: BAWD
text: an honorable man.

speaker: MARINA
text: I desire to find him so, that I may worthily

speaker: MARINA
text: note him.

speaker: BAWD
text: Next, he’s the governor of this country and a

speaker: BAWD
text: man whom I am bound to.

speaker: MARINA
text: If he govern the country, you are bound to him

speaker: MARINA
text: indeed, but how honorable he is in that I know

speaker: MARINA
text: not.

speaker: BAWD
text: Pray you, without any more virginal fencing,

speaker: BAWD
text: will you use him kindly? He will line your apron

speaker: BAWD
text: with gold.

speaker: MARINA
text: What he will do graciously, I will thankfully

speaker: MARINA
text: receive.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Ha’ you done?

speaker: BAWD
text: My lord, she’s not paced yet. You must take some

speaker: BAWD
text: pains to work her to your manage.—Come, we will

speaker: BAWD
text: leave his Honor and her together. Go thy ways.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Now, pretty one, how long have you been

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: at this trade?

speaker: MARINA
text: What trade, sir?

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Why, I cannot name ’t but I shall offend.

speaker: MARINA
text: I cannot be offended with my trade. Please

speaker: MARINA
text: you to name it.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: How long have you been of this profession?

speaker: MARINA
text: E’er since I can remember.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Did you go to ’t so young? Were you a

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: gamester at five or at seven?

speaker: MARINA
text: Earlier too, sir, if now I be one.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Why, the house you dwell in proclaims

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: you to be a creature of sale.

speaker: MARINA
text: Do you know this house to be a place of such

speaker: MARINA
text: resort, and will come into ’t? I hear say you’re of

speaker: MARINA
text: honorable parts and are the governor of this place.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Why, hath your principal made known

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: unto you who I am?

speaker: MARINA
text: Who is my principal?

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Why, your herbwoman, she that sets

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: seeds and roots of shame and iniquity. O, you have

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: heard something of my power, and so stand aloof

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: for more serious wooing. But I protest to thee,

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: pretty one, my authority shall not see thee, or else

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: look friendly upon thee. Come, bring me to some

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: private place. Come, come.

speaker: MARINA
text: If you were born to honor, show it now;

speaker: MARINA
text: If put upon you, make the judgment good

speaker: MARINA
text: That thought you worthy of it.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: How’s this? How’s this? Some more. Be sage.

speaker: MARINA
text: For me

speaker: MARINA
text: That am a maid, though most ungentle Fortune

speaker: MARINA
text: Have placed me in this sty, where, since I came,

speaker: MARINA
text: Diseases have been sold dearer than physic—

speaker: MARINA
text: That the gods

speaker: MARINA
text: Would set me free from this unhallowed place,

speaker: MARINA
text: Though they did change me to the meanest bird

speaker: MARINA
text: That flies i’ the purer air!

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: I did not think

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Thou couldst have spoke so well, ne’er dreamt thou couldst.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Had I brought hither a corrupted mind,

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Thy speech had altered it. Hold, here’s gold for thee.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Persevere in that clear way thou goest

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: And the gods strengthen thee!

speaker: MARINA
text: The good gods preserve you.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: For me, be you thoughten

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: That I came with no ill intent, for to me

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: The very doors and windows savor vilely.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Fare thee well. Thou art a piece of virtue,

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: And I doubt not but thy training hath been noble.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Hold, here’s more gold for thee.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: A curse upon him, die he like a thief,

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: That robs thee of thy goodness! If thou dost

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Hear from me, it shall be for thy good.

speaker: BOLT
text: I beseech your Honor, one piece

speaker: BOLT
text: for me.

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Avaunt, thou damnèd doorkeeper!

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Your house, but for this virgin that doth prop it,

speaker: LYSIMACHUS
text: Would sink and overwhelm you. Away!

speaker: BOLT
text: How’s this? We must take another course with

speaker: BOLT
text: you! If your peevish chastity, which is not worth a

speaker: BOLT
text: breakfast in the cheapest country under the cope,

speaker: BOLT
text: shall undo a whole household, let me be gelded

speaker: BOLT
text: like a spaniel. Come your ways.

speaker: MARINA
text: Whither would you have me?

speaker: BOLT
text: I must have your maidenhead taken off, or the

speaker: BOLT
text: common hangman shall execute it. Come your

speaker: BOLT
text: way. We’ll have no more gentlemen driven away.

speaker: BOLT
text: Come your ways, I say.

speaker: BAWD
text: How now, what’s the matter?

speaker: BOLT
text: Worse and worse, mistress. She has here spoken

speaker: BOLT
text: holy words to the Lord Lysimachus!

speaker: BAWD
text: O, abominable!

speaker: BOLT
text: He makes our profession as it were to stink afore

speaker: BOLT
text: the face of the gods.

speaker: BAWD
text: Marry, hang her up forever.

speaker: BOLT
text: The nobleman would have dealt with her like a

speaker: BOLT
text: nobleman, and she sent him away as cold as a

speaker: BOLT
text: snowball, saying his prayers too.

speaker: BAWD
text: Bolt, take her away, use her at thy pleasure,

speaker: BAWD
text: crack the glass of her virginity, and make the rest

speaker: BAWD
text: malleable.

speaker: BOLT
text: An if she were a thornier piece of ground than

speaker: BOLT
text: she is, she shall be plowed.

speaker: MARINA
text: Hark, hark, you gods!

speaker: BAWD
text: She conjures. Away with her! Would she had

speaker: BAWD
text: never come within my doors.—Marry, hang you!—

speaker: BAWD
text: She’s born to undo us.—Will you not go the way of

speaker: BAWD
text: womenkind? Marry come up, my dish of chastity

speaker: BAWD
text: with rosemary and bays!

speaker: BOLT
text: Come, mistress, come your way with me.

speaker: MARINA
text: Whither wilt thou have me?

speaker: BOLT
text: To take from you the jewel you hold so dear.

speaker: MARINA
text: Prithee, tell me one thing first.

speaker: BOLT
text: Come, now, your one thing.

speaker: MARINA
text: What canst thou wish thine enemy to be?

speaker: BOLT
text: Why, I could wish him to be my master, or

speaker: BOLT
text: rather, my mistress.

speaker: MARINA
text: Neither of these are so bad as thou art,

speaker: MARINA
text: Since they do better thee in their command.

speaker: MARINA
text: Thou hold’st a place for which the pained’st fiend

speaker: MARINA
text: Of hell would not in reputation change.

speaker: MARINA
text: Thou art the damnèd doorkeeper to every

speaker: MARINA
text: Coistrel that comes enquiring for his Tib.

speaker: MARINA
text: To the choleric fisting of every rogue

speaker: MARINA
text: Thy ear is liable. Thy food is such

speaker: MARINA
text: As hath been belched on by infected lungs.

speaker: BOLT
text: What would you have me do? Go to the wars,

speaker: BOLT
text: would you, where a man may serve seven years for

speaker: BOLT
text: the loss of a leg, and have not money enough in the

speaker: BOLT
text: end to buy him a wooden one?

speaker: MARINA
text: Do anything but this thou dost. Empty

speaker: MARINA
text: Old receptacles, or common shores, of filth;

speaker: MARINA
text: Serve by indenture to the common hangman.

speaker: MARINA
text: Any of these ways are yet better than this.

speaker: MARINA
text: For what thou professest, a baboon, could he speak,

speaker: MARINA
text: Would own a name too dear. That the gods

speaker: MARINA
text: Would safely deliver me from this place!

speaker: MARINA
text: Here, here’s gold for thee.

speaker: MARINA
text: If that thy master would gain by me,

speaker: MARINA
text: Proclaim that I can sing, weave, sew, and dance,

speaker: MARINA
text: With other virtues which I’ll keep from boast,

speaker: MARINA
text: And will undertake all these to teach.

speaker: MARINA
text: I doubt not but this populous city

speaker: MARINA
text: Will yield many scholars.

speaker: BOLT
text: But can you teach all this you speak of?

speaker: MARINA
text: Prove that I cannot, take me home again

speaker: MARINA
text: And prostitute me to the basest groom

speaker: MARINA
text: That doth frequent your house.

speaker: BOLT
text: Well, I will see what I can do for thee. If I can

speaker: BOLT
text: place thee, I will.

speaker: MARINA
text: But amongst honest women.

speaker: BOLT
text: Faith, my acquaintance lies little amongst them.

speaker: BOLT
text: But since my master and mistress hath bought

speaker: BOLT
text: you, there’s no going but by their consent. Therefore

speaker: BOLT
text: I will make them acquainted with your

speaker: BOLT
text: purpose, and I doubt not but I shall find them

speaker: BOLT
text: tractable enough. Come, I’ll do for thee what I can.

speaker: BOLT
text: Come your ways.
